title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
